action.description: Use send_message when the user explicitly asks you to send now. Use draft_message when they only want a draft or review first.

body.description: Final email body to send or save as a draft.

content.description: Alias for the final email body.

message.description: Alias for the final email body.

send_immediately.description: Set to true only when the user clearly instructed you to send immediately.

pipeline_data.description: List of deals with stage and value

results.description: Optional: existing test results to analyze

budget_data.description: Channel budgets and spend to date

task.description: Task details: title, assignee, due_date, priority

vendors.description: Vendor profiles with pricing, specs, terms

po_data.description: PO details: vendor, items, amounts, dates

invoice_content.description: Raw invoice text or extracted OCR content

system_type.description: Type of AV system (e.g., Crestron, AMX, Extron)

dataset.description: CSV, JSON, or structured text data

signals.description: Market data, news, or observations to analyze

image_content.description: Base64 encoded image or document content

output_schema.description: Expected JSON schema of extracted data

ticket.description: Ticket with subject, body, customer info

account_data.description: Usage, payment, support, engagement data per account
Usage patterns, feature adoption, contract data

rules.description: Focus block rules, meeting hygiene policies

items.description: Items to rank with their data

scope.description: Systems, applications, or processes to audit

dataset_sample.description: Sample or description of the dataset

systems.description: Systems with their data types and flows

api_spec.description: OpenAPI spec, code, or endpoint description

changes.description: List of changes: type, description, breaking

path.description: Folder path inside the workspace drive

searchQuery.description: Text to search in workspace drive file paths

path.description: Optional folder prefix to scope the search
Exact path of the file to read

fileId.description: Hashed file ID returned by workspace drive list/search

action.description: Drive action to run. Use write_text for plain text/markdown files, or export_office to generate a native office document from source content.

path.description: Optional exact target file path inside the workspace drive. If omitted, the runtime places the file under the canonical Vutler Drive root.

folder.description: Optional relative or canonical folder. Defaults to the best matching Generated/ folder under /projects/Vutler.

filename.description: Optional filename to use when path is omitted.

title.description: Optional document title used to infer the destination folder and filename.

subject.description: Optional document subject used to infer the destination folder.

content.description: UTF-8 text content to write, or office source content when action=export_office

sourceContent.description: Explicit source content used when action=export_office

sourcePath.description: Optional path to a .source.md or .source.json file to render when action=export_office

templatePath.description: Alias for sourcePath when exporting a native office document

mimeType.description: Optional MIME type for the file

path.description: Parent folder path where the new folder should be created

parentPath.description: Alias for the parent folder path

name.description: Folder name to create inside the selected parent path

event.description: Event payload with title/summary, start, end, description, location and color
Fields to update on the event

searchQuery.description: Text query for Google Drive search

event.description: Calendar event payload with summary, start, end, attendees, description and location
